item.title: Budget Battles and Fiscal Fumbles
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Budget Battles and Fiscal Fumbles

In Congress, a budget was slain,
As Trump’s foreign aid cuts took the main.
NPR’s in retreat,
PBS faced defeat,
While interest rates cause financial strain.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Senate Approves Trump’s Bid to Cancel Foreign Aid and Funds for NPR and PBS Stations
  • Trump Wants Lower Rates. Firing Powell Could Push Them Higher.

item.title: Tariffs and Tactics
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariffs and Tactics

For tariffs, Trump’s plan is a feat,
As inflation threats start to repeat.
Jerome Powell’s calm stance,
Gives markets a chance,
While China and Trump both compete.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • U.S. Inflation Mild Ahead of Expected Jump From Tariffs
  • Jerome Powell, a Potential Winner from the Trade Reprieve
  • Tariff Flip-Flops
  • There Are Two Chinas, and America Must Understand Both

item.title: Tariff Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Tariff Tango

Trump’s tariffs made shrimpers rejoice,
While Europe prepared a new choice.
The Fed’s in a pinch,
Rates can’t budge an inch,
As the markets loudly voice their noise.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Gulf Coast Shrimpers See Hope in Trump’s Tariffs
  • Europe Is Ready to Make Its First Countermove to Trump Tariffs
  • Trump’s Trade War Raises Bar for Fed Rate Cuts

item.title: Economic and Legal Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Economic and Legal Tango

Jerome and Trump have a spat,
‘Tis rates and the Fed they combat.
With lawsuits galore,
And media uproar,
Their clash keeps the headlines quite fat.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Jerome Powell and the Fed Head for Another Collision with Trump
  • Trump and His Picks Threaten More Lawsuits Over Critical Coverage

item.title: The Rate Debate
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Rate Debate

In Washington, bonds start to climb,
Though the Fed cuts rates all the time.
Trump’s plans make them wary,
As Powell’s stance stays contrary,
Mortgage rates hit a new paradigm.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Why Bond Yields Are Rising After Trump’s Victory
  • If the Fed Is Cutting Rates, Why Are Mortgage Rates Rising?
  • What Trump’s Win Means for the Federal Reserve and Jerome Powell
